tagline: The family draft is entering the house.

seasonCalendar.notes: Contestants reveal today. Draft results will be added after the family draft.

events.title: Cast reveal day
events.description: The BB28 house is about to open. Official contestants and family draft picks will be added as soon as they are available.

scoring.notes: Initial scoring is simple: count active drafted houseguests, then highlight the winner. We can adjust this if the family uses custom rules.
